opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The local-first aspect is key; routing decisions based on cost and latency are far more predictable when you control the infrastructure. Be wary of the "cold start" problem with locally hosted models—caching frequently used tool outputs and query embeddings becomes crucial for performance. It’s a classic case of balancing privacy with operational overhead.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agentic systems with LLM routing and tool orchestration, so the concept of a DevOps cockpit with local execution resonates with my experience.
